building_categories.description: Retail stores, restaurants, shopping centers, and consumer-facing businesses
Schools, colleges, daycares, and other educational institutions
Venues for recreation and entertainment including theaters, sports arenas, and nightclubs
Municipal and county government buildings including city hall and courthouses
Hotels, motels, and lodging establishments from budget to luxury
Warehouses, manufacturing facilities, data centers, and storage facilities
Essential city infrastructure including parking, transit stations, and transportation hubs
Healthcare facilities including hospitals, clinics, dental offices, and veterinary clinics
Professional workspaces including office buildings, corporate headquarters, and coworking spaces
Government services including libraries, community centers, fire stations, and police stations
Places of worship including churches, mosques, synagogues, and temples
Housing buildings including apartments, condos, townhouses, and senior living facilities

item_categories.description: Hints or pieces of information that help solve a case
Items that are used up or consumed
Written or printed records and paperwork
Material or information that establishes facts in a case
Systematic inquiry or examination to uncover facts
Critical items required to advance the story
Miscellaneous items that do not fit other categories
Close observation of a person, place, or activity
Instruments or devices used to perform tasks
Objects that can be used to cause harm

evidence_categories.description: Electronic data, files, emails, or digital media
Written records, contracts, letters, or printed documents
Scientific analysis results such as fingerprints, DNA, or ballistics
Photographs, images, and visual documentation of scenes, persons, or objects
Tangible objects or materials collected from a scene
Statements or accounts provided by witnesses or persons of interest

case_types.name: Blackmail
case_types.description: Identify the source of a blackmail threat and neutralise it

case_types.name: Corporate Espionage
case_types.description: Uncover an internal information leak damaging a business

case_types.name: Fraud
case_types.description: Uncover deliberate financial deception or identity misrepresentation

case_types.name: Infidelity
case_types.description: Gather evidence of a partner's unfaithful behaviour

case_types.name: Missing Person
case_types.description: Locate a person who has disappeared and determine what happened to them

case_types.name: Murder
case_types.description: Reinvestigate a suspicious death the authorities closed too quickly

case_types.name: Stalking
case_types.description: Identify and document a stalker threatening the client or their family

case_types.name: Theft
case_types.description: Identify who stole property and, if possible, recover it

discovery_methods.name: Background Check
discovery_methods.description: Research the subject's history, associates, and prior activities

discovery_methods.name: Documents
discovery_methods.description: Obtain and review financial records, contracts, or correspondence

discovery_methods.name: Forensics
discovery_methods.description: Submit physical evidence to a laboratory for scientific analysis

discovery_methods.name: Interview
discovery_methods.description: Speak to a witness, suspect, or contact to obtain information

discovery_methods.name: Physical Search
discovery_methods.description: Search a building or outdoor location for hidden objects or signs

discovery_methods.name: Surveillance
discovery_methods.description: Observe the subject at a location over a period of time

evidence_modifiers.name: Blood
evidence_modifiers.description: Serological test for the presence, type, and source of blood

evidence_modifiers.name: DNA
evidence_modifiers.description: DNA profile analysis for positive identification

evidence_modifiers.name: Fiber
evidence_modifiers.description: Textile fiber analysis to match clothing or fabrics at the scene

evidence_modifiers.name: Fingerprints
evidence_modifiers.description: Latent fingerprint analysis to identify who handled the item

evidence_modifiers.name: Glass Fragments
evidence_modifiers.description: Glass origin and breakage-pattern analysis

evidence_modifiers.name: Hair
evidence_modifiers.description: Hair follicle and shaft analysis for identification or contact transfer

evidence_modifiers.name: Soil
evidence_modifiers.description: Soil composition analysis to link a suspect or item to a location

evidence_modifiers.name: Tool Marks
evidence_modifiers.description: Impression analysis of marks left by tools, weapons, or forced entry

evidence_modifiers.name: Accelerant
evidence_modifiers.description: Detection of fire accelerants such as petrol, paraffin, or solvents

evidence_modifiers.name: Ballistics
evidence_modifiers.description: Firearm and projectile analysis to match bullets or casings to a weapon

evidence_modifiers.name: Chemical Residue
evidence_modifiers.description: Detection and identification of chemical or drug residue on surfaces

evidence_modifiers.name: Digital Data
evidence_modifiers.description: Data recovery and analysis from electronic devices or storage media

evidence_modifiers.name: Handwriting
evidence_modifiers.description: Handwriting comparison and document authenticity analysis

evidence_modifiers.name: Paint Transfer
evidence_modifiers.description: Paint chip and transfer analysis to link vehicles or surfaces

evidence_modifiers.name: Tire Tracks
evidence_modifiers.description: Tire tread pattern and wear analysis to identify a vehicle

evidence_modifiers.name: Gunshot Residue
evidence_modifiers.description: Detection of primer and propellant residue on hands, clothing, or surfaces

evidence_modifiers.name: Toxicology
evidence_modifiers.description: Analysis of body fluids or substances for drugs, poisons, or alcohol

evidence_modifiers.name: Bite Marks
evidence_modifiers.description: Dental impression comparison to identify an individual from bite wounds

evidence_modifiers.name: Ink Analysis
evidence_modifiers.description: Ink composition and age analysis for document dating or authenticity

evidence_modifiers.name: Explosive Residue
evidence_modifiers.description: Detection and identification of explosive compounds or detonator fragments

evidence_items.name: Bullet Casing
evidence_items.description: A spent cartridge case that can be linked to a specific firearm

evidence_items.name: Cigarette
evidence_items.description: A used cigarette that may carry saliva DNA or fingerprints

evidence_items.name: Cloth
evidence_items.description: A torn or discarded piece of fabric found at the scene

evidence_items.name: Document
evidence_items.description: A note, letter, or printed page found at or near the scene

evidence_items.name: Drinking Glass
evidence_items.description: A common glass that may have been handled or used by a suspect

evidence_items.name: Hair Sample
evidence_items.description: One or more hairs collected from the scene

evidence_items.name: Kitchen Knife
evidence_items.description: A bladed kitchen utensil that could be a weapon or was near one

evidence_items.name: Shoe Print
evidence_items.description: A cast or photograph of a shoe impression left at the scene

evidence_items.name: Mobile Phone
evidence_items.description: A smartphone or mobile device found at or linked to the scene

evidence_items.name: Paint Chip
evidence_items.description: A chip or scraping of paint collected from a surface or vehicle

evidence_items.name: Burned Material
evidence_items.description: Charred debris or material collected from a fire scene

evidence_items.name: Envelope
evidence_items.description: A postal envelope that may have been licked, sealed, or addressed by hand

evidence_items.name: Tire Impression
evidence_items.description: A cast or photograph of a tire mark left at or near the scene

evidence_items.name: Syringe
evidence_items.description: A used syringe found at the scene that may contain drug traces

evidence_items.name: Letter
evidence_items.description: A personal letter found at or sent to the scene

evidence_items.name: Firearm
evidence_items.description: A gun recovered from the scene or linked to the investigation

improvement_categories.description: Creative expression and artistic skill improvements
Cognitive and mental skill improvements such as memory, focus, and deduction
Physical fitness and body conditioning improvements
